body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Daimon** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Daimonic voice — voice-hearing continuum, inner speech misattribution, corollary discharge.

**Understanding auditory verbal hallucinations: asystematic review of current evidence.**. Acta Psychiatr Scand.. PMID: 26661730. DOI: 10.1111/acps.12531. OBJECTIVE: Auditory verbal hallucinations (AVHs) are core features of psychotic illness and remain significant in predicting poor outcome and risk. There has been awide range of approaches to understanding these experiences. METHOD: Asystematic literature review summarizing different methods of investigation and their results; phenomenology, descriptive psychopathology, psychological, cognitive neurobiology, and neuroimaging.
